intro: Today we are ranking Raspberries as a fruit, per 100g, so you can see where it really lands.

sections.title: Fats
sections.narration: fat is 0.7g. omega 3 is doing huge work here. for a fruit, the cleanest wins are low sugar and decent fibre.
sections.subtitleText: fat is 0.7g. omega 3 is doing huge work here. for a fruit, the cleanest wins are low sugar and decent fibre.

sections.title: Carbs
sections.narration: carbs is 11.9g. sugar and glycemic index stand out most. for a fruit, sugar moderation is the whole game.
sections.subtitleText: carbs is 11.9g. sugar and glycemic index stand out most. for a fruit, sugar moderation is the whole game.

sections.title: Proteins
sections.narration: protein is 1.2g. bioavailability is doing serious work here. for a fruit, this really comes down to sugar control.
sections.subtitleText: protein is 1.2g. bioavailability is doing serious work here. for a fruit, this really comes down to sugar control.

sections.title: Vitamins
sections.narration: vitamin c at 31% DV, vitamin a at 1% DV stand out most.
sections.subtitleText: vitamin c at 31% DV, vitamin a at 1% DV stand out most.

sections.title: Minerals
sections.narration: potassium at 3% DV, magnesium at 5% DV stand out most. everything else here is pretty flat.
sections.subtitleText: potassium at 3% DV, magnesium at 5% DV stand out most. everything else here is pretty flat.

sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: biggest pros here. excellent fruit-category fit. contains useful polyphenols. light for the volume.

displayItems.title: excellent fruit-category fit
displayItems.explanation: Very strong fibre moderation and low glycemic behaviour make it a clean example of what the fruit category is supposed to reward.

displayItems.title: contains useful polyphenols
displayItems.explanation: Adds extra plant-compound value beyond the base nutrient display.

displayItems.title: light for the volume
displayItems.explanation: A practical advantage for a sweet food.

sections.subtitleText: biggest pros here. excellent fruit-category fit. contains useful polyphenols. light for the volume.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: biggest cons here. quite perishable. can be pricey. protein contribution is negligible.

displayItems.title: quite perishable
displayItems.explanation: Storage life is not amazing compared with sturdier fruits.

displayItems.title: can be pricey
displayItems.explanation: Cost can limit how practical it is as a staple fruit.

displayItems.title: protein contribution is negligible
displayItems.explanation: Not a real flaw for fruit, but still basically absent.

sections.subtitleText: biggest cons here. quite perishable. can be pricey. protein contribution is negligible.

closing.summary: So overall, Carbs are carrying this food most, while minerals are the biggest drag. It lands in S tier.
closing.finalReveal: That is a S tier food.
closing.useCaseNote: This food lands in S tier with an overall score of 57 from a base nutrition score of 54. Context lifted it by 3 points.
closing.cta: Would you rank it the same, or nah?
